description: Individual ARV delta ($50–$100/unit) × 2.3M user base = $115M–$230M class exposure. Micro-harm aggregation creates macro-enforcement trigger.
litigation_text: While each individual consumer suffered a loss of $50–$100, the aggregate harm across DraftKings' 2.3M active user base creates a class exposure of $115M–$230M, satisfying the threshold for class certification under Rule 23.
